cues.text: Lusail, and the final of the World Cup. Argentina, with the little genius chasing the one prize that has escaped him... against France, the holders, and Kylian Mbappé. Whatever you are doing — stop.
Messi. From the penalty spot... GOAL! Lionel Messi scores in a World Cup final! Argentina lead!
Argentina slice France open — Mac Allister, rolled across — Di María! Oh, that is a glorious, glorious team goal! Two nil!
Fernandez goes into the referee's book.
And that's half time. Argentina 3, France 3.
Rabiot goes into the referee's book.
A penalty to France, out of absolutely nothing. Mbappé... scores. Game on.
MBAPPÉ! An astonishing side volley! Ninety seven seconds, two goals — we are LEVEL in the World Cup final!
Thuram goes into the referee's book.
Giroud goes into the referee's book.
Marcos Acuña goes into the referee's book.
Extra time it is. Thirty more minutes to settle it.
Lautaro shoots, spilled — MESSI! Messi has surely won the World Cup! The hundred and eighth minute!
Handball! Penalty! Mbappé again — a hat trick, in a World Cup final! The first since nineteen sixty six! Three three!
So it comes down to this. A penalty shoot-out will decide it.
Kylian Mbappé steps up... and scores. 0 1.
Lionel Messi steps up... and scores. 1 1.
Coman steps up... SAVED! Kept out!
Paulo Dybala steps up... and scores. 2 1.
Aurélien Tchouaméni steps up... He misses! Wide!
Leandro Paredes steps up... and scores. 3 1.
Randal Kolo steps up... and scores. 3 2.
Montiel. For the World Cup itself... ARGENTINA ARE CHAMPIONS OF THE WORLD! Lionel Messi has his World Cup! The greatest final ever played, settled from the spot!
